title: phyllanthus ciccoides
intro: Phyllanthus ciccoides, also known as the Tibetan alpine spurge or Phyllanthus crenatus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Phyllanthus ciccoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Phyllanthus ciccoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
